principle: Name every image file with a keyword-rich hyphenated description — crawlers read filenames as contextual signals for image indexing
explanation: X.seo|image_filename: file_name -> crawler_context_signal; formula: primary_keyword-secondary_keyword-descriptor.ext; hyphens_only(crawler_reads_hyphen_as_word_separator); match_filename_to_surrounding_page_topic; NO:DSC_0042.jpg NO:image1.png NO:spaces_or_underscores_in_filename; eg: "IMG_2031.jpg" >> "red-running-shoes-nike-air-women.jpg"

principle: Add a visible caption beneath every editorial image — captions are read 3x more than body text and carry keyword weight for image search
explanation: X.seo|image_caption: caption_text -> read_3x_more_than_body + keyword_signal_for_image_search; write_as_sentence_describing_image_in_context; include_primary_keyword_naturally; use_

principle: Embed IPTC metadata and display photographer credit on every original image — E-E-A-T signals authorship and Google's guidelines penalize undisclosed AI-generated visuals
explanation: X.seo|eeat_image_authorship: original_photo -> embed_IPTC: creator+copyright+description; display_credit_near_image; AI_generated -> add_disclosure_label(Google_2024_policy); schema: ImageObject.author + ImageObject.license; NO:stock_photos_without_attribution_on_YMYL_pages NO:undisclosed_AI_images_in_news_or_health; eg: " no credit" >> " + + ImageObject schema with author"

principle: Add image namespace entries to your XML sitemap for every page with SEO-critical images — Google reliably discovers images listed in sitemaps, not just crawled in HTML
explanation: X.seo|image_sitemap: xml_sitemap -> add_image:image_block_per_url; required: image:loc + image:title + image:caption; max_1000_images_per_sitemap_file; submit_via_search_console; NO:images_only_in_JS_galleries_without_sitemap_entry NO:sitemap_without_xmlns:image_namespace; eg: "<url><loc>/product</loc></url>" >> "<url><loc>/product</loc><image:image><image:loc>img.avif</image:loc><image:title>Red Nike Air Women</image:title></image:image></url>"

principle: Set og:image, og:image:width, og:image:height, and og:image:alt on every page — incomplete OG tags cause platforms to crop or reject the share preview
explanation: X.seo|og_image_complete: og:image_alone -> platform_may_crop_or_reject; required_set: og:image(absolute_URL_1200x630) + og:image:width(1200) + og:image:height(630) + og:image:alt; add: twitter:card=summary_large_image + twitter:image; NO:og:image_relative_URL NO:missing_dimensions NO:og:image_without_alt; eg: "<meta property='og:image' content='/img.jpg'>" >> "og:image(absolute) + og:image:width(1200) + og:image:height(630) + og:image:alt + twitter:card"

principle: Never embed important text inside images — crawlers cannot read pixel-rendered text, making headlines and CTAs invisible to search and inaccessible to screen readers
explanation:
X.seo|no_text_in_images: text_baked_into_image -> crawler_blind + translation_impossible + screen_reader_fails; move_to: HTML_overlay_on_hero OR CSS_text_on_background; exception: logos_and_decorative_badges_only; if_unavoidable: duplicate_text_in_alt+nearby_heading; NO:CTA_text_in_banner_image NO:headline_as_image_text; eg: "hero.jpg_with_'Free_Shipping'_baked_in" >> "hero.jpg +

Free Shipping

in HTML"
